query:
SELECT
                mi.id,
                mi.is_video,
                mi.has_thumbnails,
                mi.duration_ms::INT as duration_ms,
                mi.taken_at_local::TEXT as "timestamp!",
                ami.added_at
            FROM album_media_item ami
            JOIN media_item mi ON ami.media_item_id = mi.id
            WHERE ami.album_id = $1
            AND mi.deleted = false
            ORDER BY ami.rank ASC
